mapper.sql: id, user_id, feature_type, summary, strengths, gaps, recommendations, extracted_skills, criteria, job_family, completeness_score, ai_score, quality_warnings, model, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO profile_ai_analysis (user_id, feature_type, summary, strengths, gaps, recommendations, extracted_skills, criteria, job_family, completeness_score, ai_score, quality_warnings, model, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{featureType}, #{summary}, #{strengths}, #{gaps}, #{recommendations}, #{extractedSkills}, #{criteria}, #{jobFamily}, #{completenessScore}, #{aiScore}, #{qualityWarnings}, #{model}, #{status}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE summary = VALUES(summary), strengths = VALUES(strengths), gaps = VALUES(gaps), recommendations = VALUES(recommendations), extracted_skills = VALUES(extracted_skills), criteria = VALUES(criteria), job_family = VALUES(job_family), completeness_score = VALUES(completeness_score), ai_score = VALUES(ai_score), quality_warnings = VALUES(quality_warnings), model = VALUES(model), status = VALUES(status)
mapper.select: SELECT FROM profile_ai_analysis WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
